events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Kaiser Permanente San Francisco for client 1144. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: diabetic, cardiovascular. Allergies: peanut, shellfish, tree_nut. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 45–60 g/meal. Prefers Chinese; dislikes coconut milk, beef. Cooking ability: microwave. 10 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Vegetable Stir-Fry with Tofu
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 44 g outside 45–60 g range.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/700 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut/shellfish/tree_nut ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B6.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 364/700 mg ✓, carbs 49 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut/shellfish/tree_nut ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B2.

events.title: Matched: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 435/700 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 45–60) ✓, no peanut/shellfish/tree_nut ✓. Sourced from kitchen batch B5.

events.title: Batch allocated: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B6 (80 servings, 7 labor hours on 2026-07-22).

events.title: Batch allocated: Chicken Congee with Scallions
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B2 (120 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Donation D002 feeds batch B2
events.detail: Fresh Bok Choy (cases), Carrots (25 lb bags) from Bay Area Produce Exchange — triaged as kitchen ingredient.

events.title: Batch allocated: Steamed Fish with Ginger and Rice
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B5 (20 servings, 2 labor hours on 2026-07-21).

events.title: Batch allocated: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: Serving drawn from scheduled batch B7 (110 servings, 10 labor hours on 2026-07-20).

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1144 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00 (Excelsior group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1144: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 1. 0 hard-constraint violations.
